accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as reauthorizing the CHD program through FY2025-2029 with new reporting requirements.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes the new report and strategy requirements added to the Public Health Service Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions beyond the consultation requirement noted.

effective_dates.why: Notes the 2-year deadline for report and 1-year for strategy after the report.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the reauthorization, report requirements, strategy requirements, and stakeholder consultation.

concise.why: Quite detailed and lengthy for a summary; the granular enumeration of all strategy sub-elements makes it overly long.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the committees, CDC, NIH, HRSA, and the Public Health Service Act.

correct_figures.why: Correctly states FY2025-2029 authorization and the 2-year and 1-year deadlines.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
